title: thevetiana
intro: Thevetiana, also known as the Yellow Oleander or Thevetia peruviana, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Americas, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and toxic berries. The plant contains a number of bioactive compounds, including thevetin and thevetine, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of thevetiana include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of thevetiana include extracts, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to make medicine, although caution is advised due to the plant's toxic nature.
